name: Shot Shape Challenge

setup.description: Grab a 7-iron. Before each shot, call which shape you're about to hit: stock shot, low stinger, draw, or fade. High handicappers can skip the draw and fade and just focus on the stock shot and low stinger.

rules.description: Play 3 rounds of all 4 shapes, calling your shot before every swing. A shape only counts if you called it first and it matched what came off the club.
scoring: 1 point per shape you called and executed correctly
Play 3 rounds of 4 shapes; record your best round
4 shapes per round: stock, low stinger, draw, fade

caption: Call your shot, then hit it. Stock, stinger, draw, fade -- how many can you actually produce on command? #golfable #golftok #golfpractice #loweryourhandicap
